posts.title: How to Use Novita AI in ForgeCode: Quick Guide
posts.author: ForgeCode Team
posts.summary: Guide to integrating Novita AI as a provider in ForgeCode (v2.2.2+), covering API key creation, :login setup, and model selection including Kimi K2.5, GLM-5, and MiniMax M2.5.

posts.title: Benchmarks Don't Matter — Until They Do (Part 2)
posts.author: ForgeCode Team
posts.summary: Continuation of the TermBench 2.0 improvement series examining further runtime harness optimizations and model comparisons.

posts.title: Benchmarks Don't Matter — Until They Do (Part 1)
posts.author: Tushar
posts.summary: Documents how ForgeCode improved from 25% to 78.4% pass rate on TermBench 2.0 through harness optimizations — non-interactive behavior, tool-call naming conventions, planning state enforcement, and progressive reasoning budgets — without model changes.

posts.title: Coding Agents Showdown: VSCode Forks vs. IDE Extensions vs. CLI Agents
posts.author: Tushar
posts.summary: Comparative analysis of VSCode forks (Cursor), IDE extensions, and CLI agents like ForgeCode, examining trade-offs in integration depth, security constraints, and system-level access for AI-assisted development.
